output_snapshots.annual_vs_rolling_rule: Annual fixture samples are retained as coarse season/date inventory only and are not treated as final race-time truth.
First-race time samples are timing targets derived from the matching group source, not substitutes for annual fixture samples.
Per-race time samples are racecard/programme timing targets and remain separate from annual fixture rows.
Rolling fixture or racecard samples are separate targets used to verify active-window changes and timing detail.
